contact.title: Contact Us
contact.scanWechat: Scan to add us on WeChat
contact.arrangeTime: Please contact us via WeChat to arrange your pickup or delivery time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Birdie Supply operates in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) and is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
privacy.collectText: When you place an order, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and delivery address (if applicable). We do not collect payment card information — payments are made via e-transfer or cash.
privacy.useText: We use your information solely to process and fulfill your orders, communicate with you about your order status, and arrange pickup or delivery times.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell, trade, or share your personal information with third parties. Your information is only used internally for order fulfillment.
privacy.storageText: Your order information is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We retain order data for bookkeeping purposes and delete personal information upon request.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies only to maintain your shopping cart. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to request deletion of your data, please contact us via WeChat or email at trtbirdies@gmail.com.
